statement: This phase implements genuine improvements that will not regress functionality or over-complicate the system.

control_metrics.target: 100 percent of persistent tables touched by runtime have declared owner creator consumer and readiness contract
empty-db and partial-db bootstrap converge to identical readiness results
zero runtime writes to authority-owned tables outside their declared authority surface
fresh clone bootstrap and startup pass on every release candidate
every active phase closes with review and healer evidence before next phase approval

phase_arcs.theme: converge into one coherent workflow runtime
make the operator and product surfaces trustworthy
scale harden launch then self-host improvement

phases.title: Authority Compiler Completion
phases.objective: Finish the generated authority layer so manifest bootstrap readiness and drift enforcement come from one declared source.

phases.title: Bootstrap Convergence
phases.objective: Make empty-database bootstrap and partially bootstrapped repair converge through one canonical engine.

phases.title: Persistent Schema Owner Registry
phases.objective: Declare a single named owner for each critical persistent table and eliminate ambiguous creation authority.

phases.title: Runtime Fail-Closed Schema Sweep
phases.objective: Remove or block runtime DDL for persistent tables so runtime fails closed instead of self-healing schema.

phases.title: Generated Contract Expansion
phases.objective: Generate schema contract and readiness surfaces instead of hand-maintaining them across code and tests.

phases.title: Migration Policy Closure
phases.objective: Classify every numbered SQL file as canonical bootstrap_only deprecated or dead with no leftovers.

phases.title: Fresh-Clone Proof Lane
phases.objective: Prove a fresh clone can bootstrap and reach a usable system state from zero.

phases.title: Upgrade-Path Proof Lane
phases.objective: Prove older and partially bootstrapped developer states converge without manual recovery.

phases.title: Builder Frontdoor Command
phases.objective: Expose one builder frontdoor that regenerates authority validates drift and reports readiness.

phases.title: Bootstrap Release Gate
phases.objective: Make release promotion block on authority drift bootstrap proof and readiness proof.

phases.title: Observability Authority Extraction
phases.objective: Route observability writes through owned authority surfaces instead of runtime direct SQL.

phases.title: System Event Authority Extraction
phases.objective: Advance the 60-69 enforce authority boundaries across runtime program through the durable objective named System Event Authority Extraction.

phases.title: Authority Conformance Suite
phases.objective: Fail when runtime code bypasses declared table authorities.
